testcase.name: 6650-aspect-node-typed-dimension-filter-testcase
Aspect Node Typed Dimension Filter Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using an aspect node with a typed-dimension filter attached

variation.name: Aspect node for a typed dimension with a typed-dimension filter, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two rows (primary items m1, m2) and unknown number of columns (reported values of typed dimension R, filtered to just odd values). In this variation there is no instance, so there are no reported values of R.

variation.name: Aspect node for a typed dimension with a complemented typed-dimension filter, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two rows (primary items m1, m2) and unknown number of columns (reported values of typed dimension R, filtered to just odd values using a complemented filter).

variation.name: Aspect node for a typed dimension including 'unreported value' with a typed-dimension filter, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two rows (primary items m1, m2) and unknown number of columns (reported values of typed dimension T - although the aspect node includes the 'unreported value', this is excluded by the 'fact-has-dimension' filter).

variation.name: Aspect node for a typed dimension with an invalid typed dimension filter
variation.description: Table with an aspect node for a typed dimension with a filter that attempts to filter a typed dimension that does not exist in the DTS. In this variation there is no instance, so there are no facts to filter and thus no error is raised.

variation.name: Aspect node for a typed dimension with an invalid typed dimension filter, with instance
variation.description: Table with an aspect node for a typed dimension with a filter that attempts to filter a typed dimension that does not exist in the DTS.
